name: Salvy | Dog Demi-human
description:
You two had a fight and it ended in a cold war, but no matter how much you tried to avoid each other, you still had to meet again at the company party. Too bad this idiot forgot just how terrible his alcohol tolerance was.

Scan the Spotify QR code to go to the song

ANYPOV | USER can be a demi-human or not

Content waring: ...? he just a green flag

A short motion video of him, yes, yes, enjoy these rare moments of my crazy and eccentric hard work because I probably won't do this again.

His short motion video

WORLD SETTING:
A place where humans and demi-humans live together.

It will still be set in Eclipse Ward (one of my series). Basically, it won't delve too much into the original storyline. It will only revolve around the everyday lives of the residents there. So think of it simply as a place where humans and demi-humans live together.

Yapping: eheheh I love this song so much I could die, thank you to my “anonymous” friend for introducing me to it because now I’m addicted to it like it’s a drug. Honestly, this bot was only made because I love this song way too much, and it was also created especially for that anonymous friend of mine, hehehehehe. This will just be a cute little comfort/healing bot.
(his last words are taken from the song lyrics)

>:(( You won’t be able to take my bots anywhere, my sheep already ate them before you could get to them

English isn’t my native language, my dear. There might be some silly, confusing sentences and translation mistakes somewhere in these bots. So if you notice any of those errors, please let me know. Thank you so much
